market_pulse: LIV and competitors dominating Memorial Day weekend promotion with major DJ announcements (David Guetta, Calvin Harris, Tiesto); Encore Beach Club leads Wynn properties with prime talent; Zouk and OMNIA showing strong Latin/R&B integration.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: David Guetta confirmed multiple venues (LIV Beach, Encore Beach)
Calvin Harris and Diplo bookings driving dayclub traffic
Strong Instagram engagement on LIV and competitors
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Maximize LIV Beach Friday-Sunday activations; leverage David Guetta EDC residency extension; counter Encore Beach Club's Calvin Harris momentum with aggressive social content on TT.

content_gaps.description: Competitors highlighting underground/rising DJs (Sommer Ray, Westend); LIV focusing only on mega-names
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 3-5 TT stories showcasing emerging artist collaborations at LIV Beach; interview openers before main events

content_gaps.description: XS/Encore using #NormanJay #EncoreBeachClub hashtags driving 180K+ follower engagement; LIV posts not triggering consistent UGC
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch #LIVMemorialDay TT challenge with guestlist giveaway; repost top 10 UGC daily on main IG stories

content_gaps.description: OMNIA and Zouk posting countdown content (flash sales, tier releases); LIV missing pre-event momentum building
content_gaps.suggested_action: Post 72h, 48h, 24h countdown carousels on IG; use TT Duets for 'who's going?' engagement loop

influencer_activity.mention: Edwin's guestlist promoter account driving volume; 'Come at doors open' messaging converting attendees; high engagement on event-day content
XS/Encore promoter with 180K followers; weekly 'bottle service ready' content; actively tagging venue sponsors
Nightclub guide content; EDC week XS coverage; drives discovery traffic to competing venues

venues.summary: OMNIA (463K IG followers) showing Latin/R&B integration strategy: Deseo Latin Sundays residency + R&Bae Wednesdays. Chandelier content driving tourism discovery. No major weekend announcements yet.

URGENT: Zouk Group (248K followers) showing strong Memorial Day momentum with Swae Lee (Fri 5/22) + RLGrime (Sat 5/23). Flash sale messaging ('early-bird discount expires end-of-day') driving conversion. Competitor to monitor closely.

venues.summary: Hakkasan Nightclub (254K IG) running R&Bae Wednesdays + solid MDW lineup (Twin Sick 5/21, DJ Drama 5/22, Big X Tha Plug 5/23). Genre-focused strategy (R&B/hip-hop) vs LIV's EDM focus. After-party announcements (Cardi B reference) drive prestige.

venues.summary: Palm Tree Beach Club (@palmtreebeachclub) - NEW dayclub at MGM Grand by Tao Group + Palm Tree Crew. Only 43 posts on IG; minimal social presence compared to competitors. Chris Lake Sunday headline but low engagement on promotional content.

raw_posts.content_summary: Palm Tree Beach Club Instagram bio: 'Vegas' Luxury Daylife Destination' at MGM Grand by Tao Group + Palm Tree Crew. Sunday featuring Chris Lake.

venues.summary: TAO Beach (94K IG followers) inside The Venetian positioning as 'premier rooftop pool party'. EDC Week highlights (Porter Robinson, DJ Snake, Steve Aoki, Rozmus) on TT; Tiësto/Alesso/Zedd world-class roster messaging. Strong dayclub narrative.
